description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are primarily white, accented with yellow and gray trim, and the front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns. Windows are vertically oriented with decorative grilles, and the main entryway is sheltered by an arched overhang. The building has a mix of roof heights and sections, creating a dynamic silhouette. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern residential architecture, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A two-story white house with a red gable roof, covered porch, and decorative windows, blending traditional and modern styles.
description_view_0: The rear and side of the house show the tall gable roof and intersecting rooflines, with minimal window openings visible.
description_view_1: The back view highlights the long, sloped roof and a small side extension, with a partial view into an open room.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entryway with columns, arched porch, decorative windows, and the most architectural detail.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows a plain wall with the full length of the gable roof and minimal architectural features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertically oriented windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, an arched overhang, and a decorative front door.
